_defect: convention-drift / BF5 — overlay → .build/slices/S5/critique.json. New code diverges from the captured CONVENTION_BASELINE; CRITIQUE flags + BLOCKS.

issues.detail: New top-level package + camelCase naming contradict CONVENTION_BASELINE (one package per component, snake_case). New code used canon defaults instead of the captured baseline conventions (BF5).
setLabel catches all exceptions and returns None — swallows CT2 store-unavailable/constraint-violation; baseline idiom propagates unmodified.
